subcodes.first_line: All the world hath been created for the Day of God, and the True One, glorified be His majesty, through the tongues of the Prophets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم از برای یوم الهی خلق شده اند و حق جل جلاله خلق را بلسان نبیین و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
